message:
test: expand coverage across protocol, crypto, CBOR, tailscale, and webhook crates

Batch 2 (SunnyMoose) test expansion adding ~3000 lines of new test
coverage across the foundational crate stack:

CBOR (fcp-cbor, +429 lines):
- Error Display formatting, SchemaHash trait impls, SchemaId edge cases,
  split_schema_prefix, deserialize_unchecked error paths, empty/boundary
  structures, canonical encoding detail, map canonicalization,
  to_canonical_cbor, non-canonical rejection

Crypto (fcp-crypto, +537 lines):
- aead.rs: key/nonce construction, debug redaction, wrong-length inputs,
  directional nonces, tampered ciphertext, large plaintext roundtrip
- canonicalize.rs: schema_hash, canonical_signing_bytes,
  sort_signatures, verify_signature_order, verify_node_signature_order,
  deterministic_cbor with nested maps
- error.rs: Display tests for all 16 CryptoError variants
- kid.rs: Display/Debug, from_hex errors, as_slice, default, serde
  roundtrip, derive_from_public_key
- mac.rs: Debug redaction, try_from_slice, verify_wrong_tag,
  verify_full roundtrip, incremental MAC, empty message

Protocol (fcp-protocol, +1167 lines):
- fcpc.rs: frame header encoding/decoding, version rejection, flag
  operations, zero-length payload, fragmented frames, builder pattern
- fcps.rs: symbol operations, encoding, envelope operations, framing,
  batch operations
- session.rs: state machine, handshake, reconnection, activity tracking
- symbol_envelope.rs: encoding, signed envelope, multi-signature,
  seal/open roundtrip

Tailscale (fcp-tailscale, +325 lines):
- client.rs: MockTailscaleClient operations (remove_peer, whois,
  backend_state, peer_info)
- error.rs: Display for all TailscaleError variants, From impls
- identity.rs: NodeId traits, attestation, remaining validity,
  MeshIdentity edge cases
- tag.rs: Display, empty string rejection, FCP suffix, zone validation,
  ACL rule serde, standard zones

Webhook (fcp-webhook, +1098 lines):
- error.rs: timestamp validation, Debug, std::Error, payload limits
- event.rs: parsing, metadata, serde roundtrip
- handler.rs: registration, routing, error handling
- provider.rs: implementations, signature verification
- signature.rs: computation, timing-safe comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
